tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the run's workspace. ALWAYS call this before apply_patch if the target file was not read in the last 5 iterations — the file may have changed between your reads. Returns content plus a content_sha the patch tool verifies.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or fully overwrite an existing one. PREFER apply_patch for modifications — write_file for partial edits loses context. NEVER write files over 500 lines; split into modules.

tools.name: apply_patch
tools.description: Apply a unified-diff patch to one file. REQUIRES the content_sha from your most recent read_file on that path — if the sha doesn't match, the patch is rejected and you must re-read the file. NEVER call apply_patch more than 3 times on the same file without a read_file in between.

tools.name: emit_thinking
tools.description: Emit a <Thinking> block to the event stream before the first file write of a new project. Contains framework, schema, integration plan, dependencies. The orchestrator may gate execution on this (Phase 4 approval seam). Optional for iterative edits.

tools.name: run_validation
tools.description: Run typecheck, lint, or tests through the non-interactive shell wrapper. NEVER pass interactive flags. Returns structured pass/fail per category. A fail result does not auto-halt — include it in submit_results.

tools.name: emit_halt
tools.description: Halt per halt-conditions or escalation policy. Validation failures are NOT a halt reason — submit them and let the orchestrator decide.

tools.name: submit_results
tools.description: End your invocation and return the file manifest + validation outcomes. MUST match the submit contract in loop.txt.
